title: genista sepiaria
intro: Genista sepiaria, also known as autumnal broom, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant is believed to have a range of health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe digestive problems and reduce the risk of infection. Genista sepiaria is often prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, and can also be used in tinctures and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
